title: Form
doc_html:
§236. Form

           The Louisiana Department of Health, in consultation with the Mental Health Advocacy Service, shall develop a form to implement the provisions of this Part.

           Acts 2001, No. 755, §1.
doc_text:
§236.  Form
The Louisiana Department of Health, in consultation with the Mental
Health Advocacy Service, shall develop a form to implement the provisions
of this Part.
Acts 2001, No. 755, §1.
